positive: A mesmerizing geometric mandala abstract design featuring stylized silhouettes of tropical foliage and cosmic elements. The scene is comprised of intertwining bioluminescent vines, floating crystalline stars, and simplified jungle leaves forming a perfect central pattern. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical, highly detailed, and suitable for seamless repetition on apparel. Use a deep indigo and sapphire blue color palette contrasted with glowing lime green and metallic gold highlights. Style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau linework and minimalist celestial etching. Focus on clean, bold lines, high contrast, and a symmetrical silhouette for print printing.
